zh.Cork, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 科克科克
zh.lifeSummary: 當Dame Jacquemine de Haveskerque - Dame de Watton於1331年出生在比利時時，她的父親Francois de Haverskerque26歲，母親Eleonore de Roeulx de Trazegnies21歲。她和Nicholas Paynel - Heer van Bricqueville至少有2個女兒。她去世於1405年在法國享年74歲。

zh-hans.Cork, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 科克科克
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dame Jacquemine de Haveskerque - Dame de Watton于1331年出生在比利时时，她的父亲Francois de Haverskerque26岁，母亲Eleonore de Roeulx de Trazegnies21岁。她和Nicholas Paynel - Heer van Bricqueville至少有2个女儿。她去世于1405年在法国享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dame
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and French: from Middle English, Old French dame ‘lady’ (from Latin domina ‘mistress’), applied as a nickname for a foppish young man whose outfit and manner have an effeminate elegance, or as a metonymic occupational name for someone in the service of a lady. As a French name it may also be a nickname meaning ‘mother-in-law’.
English: possibly an East Anglian variant of   Dam   4.

variants.name: Dam
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Hoa, Tuan, Ngoc, Thanh, Binh, Chanh, Duc, Hiep, Minh, Nu, Tien.  Southeast Asian Hong, Chan, Dong, Hon, Man, Oi, Ok, Phoung, Sang, Sokhom, Sun.
Vietnamese (Đàm): from the Chinese surnames 譚, 谈 and 覃, see Tan 1-3.
Cambodian: written ដាំ, possibly of Vietnamese origin (see above). The surname ដាំ also corresponds to the Khmer word meaning e.g. ‘to plant’.

nameMeanings.name: Watton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Watten, from the Middle English personal name Wat, a pet form of Walter (see Watt ), with the characteristically West Midland genitival suffix -en.

habitational name from Watton (East Yorkshire), or perhaps in some cases from Watton (Norfolk), Watton at Stone (Hertfordshire), or Wattons in Bere Ferrers (Devon). The Yorkshire placename derives from Old English wēt ‘wet’, later replaced by Old Norse vátr ‘wet’, + Old English dūn ‘hill’. The Norfolk and Devon placenames probably derive from the Old English personal name Wada + Old English tūn. The Hertfordshire placename probably derives from Old English wād ‘woad’ + tūn.
English:

variants.name: Walter
meanings: English (of Norman origin), German, Dutch, Polish, Swedish, and Danish: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This personal name was introduced into England both in the reign of Edward the Confessor and by the Normans (in the forms Walt(i)er, Waut(i)er). After the Norman Conquest it soon became one of the most popular personal names in Britain. Compare Walther .
Germanized or Americanized form of Czech, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Valter and Czech Valtr: from the personal name Valter, Valtr, of ancient Germanic origin (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Jacquemine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a French feminine diminutive form of Jacques, the French version of James . In the 1960s it became very popular in the United States and elsewhere, influenced in part by the fame and stylish image of Jacqueline Bouvier Kennedy Onassis ( 1929–94 ), whose family was of French extraction.

en.lifeSummary: When Dame Jacquemine de Haveskerque - Dame de Watton was born in 1331, in Belgium, her father, Francois de Haverskerque, was 26 and her mother, Eleonore de Roeulx de Trazegnies, was 21. She had at least 2 daughters with Nicholas Paynel - Heer van Bricqueville. She died in 1405, in France, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dame Jacquemine de Haveskerque - Dame de Watton est née en 1331, à Belgique, son père, Francois de Haverskerque, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Eleonore de Roeulx de Trazegnies, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 filles avec Nicholas Paynel - Heer van Bricqueville. Elle est décédée en 1405, à France, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dame Jacquemine de Haveskerque - Dame de Watton 1331 in Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Francois de Haverskerque 26 und ihre Mutter Eleonore de Roeulx de Trazegnies 21. Sie hatte mit Nicholas Paynel - Heer van Bricqueville mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1405 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dame Jacquemine de Haveskerque - Dame de Watton è nata il nel 1331 nel Belgio, sua padre, Francois de Haverskerque, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Eleonore de Roeulx de Trazegnies, aveva 21 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figlie con Nicholas Paynel - Heer van Bricqueville. Morì nel 1405, nel Francia, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.Cork, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ コルクコルク
ja.lifeSummary: Dame Jacquemine de Haveskerque - Dame de Wattonが1331年にベルギーで生まれた時，父Francois de Haverskerqueは26歳，母Eleonore de Roeulx de Trazegniesは21歳であった。彼女はNicholas Paynel - Heer van Bricquevilleとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1405年にフランスで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dame Jacquemine de Haveskerque - Dame de Watton(이)가 1331년 벨기에에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Francois de Haverskerque(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleonore de Roeulx de Trazegnies(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Nicholas Paynel - Heer van Bricqueville(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1405년 프랑스에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dame Jacquemine de Haveskerque - Dame de Watton nasceu em 1331, em Bélgica, seu pai, Francois de Haverskerque, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Eleonore de Roeulx de Trazegnies, tinha 21 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Nicholas Paynel - Heer van Bricqueville. Ela faleceu em 1405, em França, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dame Jacquemine de Haveskerque - Dame de Watton родилась в 1331 г. в местности Бельгия, её отцу по имени Francois de Haverskerque было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleonore de Roeulx de Trazegnies, 21. У неё было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Nicholas Paynel - Heer van Bricqueville. Она умерла в 1405 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dame Jacquemine de Haveskerque - Dame de Watton nació en 1331, en Bélgica, su papá, Francois de Haverskerque, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Eleonore de Roeulx de Trazegnies, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Nicholas Paynel - Heer van Bricqueville. Murió en 1405, en Francia, a la edad de 74 años.
